message:
chore: add perf.data pattern to .gitignore

Ignore profiling artifacts (perf.data, perf.data.*) that accumulate
from `perf record` sessions during performance optimization work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,3 +20,7 @@ golden_outputs/
 # Python caches (conformance tooling)
 __pycache__/
 *.pyc
+
+# Profiling artifacts
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
